purpose: Provides precise positioning and orientation control for cutting tools, maintaining accuracy and rigidity during machining operations

states.name: positioning_accuracy_degradation
states.description: Cutting tool positioning accuracy degradation from velocity loop gain issues

states.name: interface_rigidity_degradation
states.description: Tool interface rigidity degradation from motor power control issues

states.name: orientation_accuracy_degradation
states.description: Orientation stop accuracy degradation from improper gear ratio settings

events.name: position_sensor_polarity_incorrect
events.description: Position sensor polarity setting is incorrect

events.name: gear_ratio_parameter_error
events.description: Gear ratio parameter out of valid range

parameters.name: positioning_degradation_timescale
parameters.description: Time constant for positioning accuracy degradation

parameters.name: rigidity_degradation_timescale
parameters.description: Time constant for interface rigidity degradation

parameters.name: orientation_degradation_timescale
parameters.description: Time constant for orientation accuracy degradation

parameters.name: positioning_stress_factor
parameters.description: Stress factor affecting positioning accuracy degradation rate

parameters.name: rigidity_stress_factor
parameters.description: Stress factor affecting interface rigidity degradation rate

parameters.name: orientation_stress_factor
parameters.description: Stress factor affecting orientation accuracy degradation rate

parameters.name: motor_overheat_threshold
parameters.description: Interface rigidity degradation threshold for motor overheat detection

parameters.name: velocity_error_threshold
parameters.description: Positioning accuracy degradation threshold for velocity error warning

parameters.name: position_sensor_threshold
parameters.description: Positioning accuracy degradation threshold for sensor polarity fault

parameters.name: position_coder_threshold
parameters.description: Positioning accuracy degradation threshold for coder disconnection

parameters.name: gear_ratio_threshold
parameters.description: Orientation accuracy degradation threshold for gear ratio parameter error

state_transition_logic: positioning_accuracy_degradation decreases by (1.0 / positioning_degradation_timescale) * positioning_stress_factor * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
interface_rigidity_degradation decreases by (1.0 / rigidity_degradation_timescale) * rigidity_stress_factor * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
orientation_accuracy_degradation decreases by (1.0 / orientation_degradation_timescale) * orientation_stress_factor * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
assumptions: Tool interface degradation is primarily driven by operational stress factors
Positioning accuracy degrades due to velocity loop gain drift over time
Interface rigidity degrades due to motor power control system wear
Orientation accuracy degrades due to gear ratio parameter drift
All degradation mechanisms follow exponential decay patterns
Fault conditions are triggered when degradation states fall below specific thresholds
